chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-612 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing/Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 5109/24 2. For hearing of main case. 16.2.2026 None present --------------------- This is an old matter, however there is no progress in the matter, on the last date of hearing final chance was given to the petitioner to appear and assist this Court on 06.02.2026. Today petitioner and his counsel are called absent without intimation. This court is left with no option but to dismiss this petition in default. JUDGE Shafi
